title: Battery icon
drDigitalIntro:
The battery icon shows how much power is left.
• It works like a gas gauge.
• When it gets low, it's time to plug in your charger.
drDigitalSuccess: That's the battery icon — keep an eye on it so you know when to charge!
drDigitalHint: Find the battery near the clock on the playground desktop, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
